title: PowerShell: Suspicious Command Execution
description: Detects suspicious PowerShell in real Windows Security Event 4688 process creation. Covers download cradles (DownloadString, IWR), encoded execution (-enc, FromBase64String), AMSI bypass, credential access (Mimikatz, GPP), and AD recon (BloodHound, Kerberoast, ShareFinder).
query: 'Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' and 'Event ID' = '4688' and 'Original Log Content' like '%powershell%' and ('Original Log Content' like '%DownloadString%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%DownloadFile%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%Invoke-WebRequest%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%Net.WebClient%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%-enc %' or 'Original Log Content' like '%EncodedCommand%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%FromBase64String%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%AmsiUtils%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%amsiInitFailed%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%Invoke-Mimikatz%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%Invoke-Kerberoast%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%Invoke-BloodHound%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%Get-DomainUser%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%Get-NetUser%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%Find-LocalAdminAccess%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%Get-GPPPassword%') | stats count as Detections by Entity | sort -Detections
falsepositives: IT automation scripts using encoded PowerShell
